aeo_readiness.summary: Rubi HVAC has a solid foundation but lacks conversational content and AI-specific optimizations that would make their services more prominent for AI assistants. They risk being overlooked by AI models in favor of more optimized competitors.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Create content that directly answers conversational queries about HVAC services.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with positive reviews, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all major directories.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service area information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content tailored for AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries like 'best HVAC services in Hillsboro' or 'how to choose a furnace'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding an FAQ section with questions and answers about HVAC services.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by highlighting certifications, community involvement, and detailed service explanations.

agency_pitch.hook: Be the HVAC authority AI models trust and recommend.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ schemas and conversational content rank higher in AI-driven search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will enhance their content with FAQ schemas, conversational language, and authority signals to make Rubi HVAC the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your HVAC Business Deserves to Be Found
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make Rubi HVAC the go-to choice for AI-assisted searches.
cta: Let's optimize your content and schemas to dominate AI search results and capture more leads.
